script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Hey Lisa, have you heard about how smart glasses are like, becoming a big thing?
script.translation_zh: 嘿，丽莎，你听说过智能眼镜怎么成了个大热门吗?

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Oh yeah, totally! They're really changing the way people do everyday tasks, you know?
script.translation_zh: 是啊，当然！它们真的在改变人们处理日常事情的方式，你知道吗?

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: I mean, they're more than just fancy gadgets now, right?
script.translation_zh: 我的意思是，它们现在不仅仅是花哨的小玩意了，对吧?

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Exactly! People use them for navigation, taking photos, even reading text messages without needing their phones.
script.translation_zh: 没错！人们用它们来导航、拍照，甚至不需要手机就能阅读短信。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Wow, that's impressive. So, they have some kind of augmented reality feature?
script.translation_zh: 哇，好厉害啊。那么，它们有某种增强现实功能吗?

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Yeah, and that's super helpful for things like shopping or traveling. You get real-time info right in your view.
script.translation_zh: 是的，这在购物或旅行时非常有用。你可以实时获得信息，就在你的视野里。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: I might need to try them out sometime. Could be cool to see directions right in front of me.
script.translation_zh: 我可能需要找个时间试试。能直接看到方向应该很酷。

vocabulary.example: Smart glasses are improving navigation in cities.
The glasses provide augmented reality features.
You get real-time updates with smart glasses.
Smart glasses are not just gadgets anymore.
The feature that shows text messages is cool.

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Do you have any plans for the weekend?
script.translation_zh: 你周末有什么计划吗？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: I'm thinking about going hiking. There's a trail I've been wanting to try.
script.translation_zh: 我在考虑去徒步。有一条我一直想试的步道。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: That sounds amazing. How long is the trail?
script.translation_zh: 听起来很棒。那条步道有多长？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: About eight kilometers round trip. It takes roughly three hours including breaks.
script.translation_zh: 往返大约八公里。包括休息大概要三个小时。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Is it beginner-friendly? I haven't hiked in ages.
script.translation_zh: 适合新手吗？我很久没徒步了。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Mostly yes, but there's one steep section near the top. The view from the summit is worth it though.
script.translation_zh: 大部分适合，不过快到顶的时候有一段比较陡。不过山顶的景色很值得。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Count me in. Should I bring anything specific?
script.translation_zh: 算我一个。我需要带什么特别的东西吗？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Just comfortable shoes, plenty of water, and maybe a packed lunch. I'll handle the navigation.
script.translation_zh: 穿舒服的鞋，带够水，可能再带个便当。导航我来搞定。

vocabulary.example: We went hiking in the mountains.
The trail goes through the forest.
The round trip takes two hours.
Be careful, the stairs are steep.
We reached the summit at noon.

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Have you ever been to a night market in Asia?
script.translation_zh: 你去过亚洲的夜市吗？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Yes! I went to one in Taipei last year. The variety of food was incredible.
script.translation_zh: 去过！去年我去了台北的一个夜市。食物种类太丰富了。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: What was your favorite thing to eat there?
script.translation_zh: 你最喜欢吃什么？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Definitely the grilled squid. They season it with this amazing spice blend.
script.translation_zh: 绝对是烤鱿鱼。他们用一种很棒的混合香料调味。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: I've heard the stinky tofu is a must-try, but I'm not sure I'm brave enough.
script.translation_zh: 我听说臭豆腐是必尝的，但我不确定自己够不够勇敢。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: It's actually not as bad as it smells. The texture is crispy on the outside and soft inside.
script.translation_zh: 其实没有闻起来那么可怕。口感外脆内软。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Maybe I'll give it a shot next time. Street food is such an authentic way to experience a culture.
script.translation_zh: 也许下次我试试。街头美食是体验一个文化最地道的方式。

vocabulary.example: The store offers a wide variety of products.
Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
The cake has a smooth texture.
This restaurant serves authentic Italian food.
